name: grid-shortcircuit-smib-golden
notes: SMIB 手算对拍（examples/smib.json：baseMVA=100，kv=10→z_base=1Ω，x_line=0.2 pu，X'd=0.3 pu）。建模：slack（bus-1）并入源阻抗 j·1e-6 pu，机组在 bus-2 并入 jX'd=j0.3，负荷忽略。Z_th(bus-2) = j[(x_line + x_src) ∥ X'd] = j[(0.2+1e-6)·0.3/(0.2+1e-6+0.3)] = j0.1200004 pu（纯电抗，r=0）。V_pre(bus-2)=1.0（PV 设定）→ I_f = 1.0/0.1200004 = 8.33331 pu；S_sc = I_f×baseMVA = 833.331 MVA；I_ka = S_sc/(√3×10 kV) = 48.1124 kA。实测 zth.x=0.12000036、i_f_pu=8.333308、s_sc=833.3308、i_f_ka=48.11238，与手算一致。
